"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\LinkedListTests.dir/objects.a
D:\cppCompliler\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\LinkedListTests.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\LinkedListTests.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\cppCompliler\mingw64\bin\c++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\LinkedListTests.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o LinkedListTests.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libLinkedListTests.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\LinkedListTests.dir\linkLibs.rsp
